title: These Were The Five Best- And Worst-Performing Real Estate Stocks In October 2022
text: Real estate stocks help investors insulate their portfolio against rising inflation.

title: SBA Communications Is Solid, But These 2 Higher Yields Are Way Better
text: SBAC is a high-quality growth stock in the tower business that is positioned well for the 5G buildout. While SBAC may be attractive in a normal market, it appears expensive relative to peers.

title: SBA Communications' (SBAC) Q3 FFO & Revenues Beat, View Up
text: SBA Communications (SBAC) reports better-than-anticipated Q3 results. An increase in site-leasing and site-development revenues aids the top line.
